expressions.english: to listen to music
expressions.notes: 음악 = music

expressions.english: to listen to advice
expressions.notes: 조언 = advice

expressions.english: to listen to a story
expressions.notes: 이야기 = story; what one says

expressions.english: What are you listening to now?
expressions.notes:
뭐 = what; something
뭐 is the contracted form of 무엇.
-고 있다 = to be + V-ing

expressions.english:
Listen to my story.
Listen to me.
expressions.notes:
제 = (polite) my; I
-이/어/여 보다 = to try + V-ing

expressions.english: Do you like listening to music?
expressions.notes: 좋아하다 = to like

expressions.english: I'm listening to an audiobook.
expressions.notes: 오디오북 = audiobook

expressions.english: I will listen to (and be obedient to) my parents.
expressions.notes:
부모님 = parents
말씀 = (honorific) word; advice; what one says
잘 = well; carefully
말(씀) 듣다 = to obey, do what someone tells you to do

expressions.english: I want to listen to some exciting music.
expressions.notes:
신나다 = to be exciting; to be excited
-고 싶다 = to want to + V

expressions.english: I can't stand this person's songs.
expressions.notes: 노래 = song

expressions.english: Can you listen to my story?
expressions.notes: -이/어/여 주다 = to do something for someone

expressions.english: I heard a funny story.
expressions.notes: 재미있다 = to be fun; to be funny; to be interesting

expressions.english: I listen to quiet music before I go to sleep.
expressions.notes:
자다 = to sleep
-기 전에 = before + V-ing
조용하다 = to be quiet

expressions.korean: 그 사람 이름은 들어 본 적이 없어요.
expressions.english: I have never heard of his name.
expressions.notes:
이름 = name
-이/어/여 본 적이 없다 = to have not + p.p.

expressions.english: After I listened to my friend's advice, I've changed my mind.
expressions.notes: 바꾸다 = to change

expressions.korean: 그 사람 말을 듣고 있으니 화가 났어요.
expressions.english: I got angry as I listened to his story.
expressions.notes:
-고 있다 = as + S + be + V-ing + as a result
화 = anger
화가 나다 = to get angry

expressions.korean: 이제 와서 그런 말은 듣고 싶지 않아요.
expressions.english: I don't want to hear things like that right now.
expressions.notes:
이제 와서 = now; now that things have happened like this
그런 = (something) like that; such + noun

expressions.korean: 그때 엄마 말을 듣지 않은 걸 후회해요.
expressions.english: I regret that I didn't listen to my mom back then.
expressions.notes:
그때 = at that time; back then
엄마 = mom
후회하다 = to regret

expressions.korean: 다른 사람의 의견을 듣는 것도 중요해요.
expressions.english: It is important to listen to other people's opinions.
expressions.notes:
다르다 = to be different
다른 = other; another
의견 = opinion
중요하다 = to be important

expressions.korean: 저 사람은 항상 듣기 좋은 말만 해서 신뢰가 안 가요.
expressions.english: He is always just saying flattering things, so I can't trust him.
expressions.notes:
저 = that
항상 = always; all the time
듣다 = to hear; to listen
-기 좋다 = to be easy to + V; to be nice to + V
듣기 좋은 말 = flattery
-만 = only; just
신뢰 = trust
신뢰가 가다 = to be trustworthy
